message:
test(proptest): add 14 property tests for NamespaceIsolation-PolicyEngine integration

Cover PolicyEngine authorize() namespace boundary enforcement for pane and
connector actions, from_safety_config wiring, governance operations
(bind_resource_to_namespace, check_cross_tenant_access), audit chain
recording, and metrics dashboard reflection. Includes serde roundtrip
for NamespaceIsolationConfig.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
